privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task uses synthetically generated test log strings and configuration parameters. The required target port is 514 via UDP, with an allowed IP constraint containing '172.16' (representing 172.16.0.0/12) as checked by the verifier. The custom rule must use ID 100100 and match the string '%ASA-4-106023'. The exact test log injected by the export script to trigger the alert is '<134>Mar 15 10:00:00 cisco-asa %ASA-4-106023: Deny tcp src outside:198.51.100.1/443 dst inside:10.0.0.5/80'.
